title: bromus hispidus
intro: Bromus hispidus, also known as the hairy brome or rough brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bromus hispidus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
